UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOSCO CREDIT LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, CARMEN AN INDIVIDUAL $77,768.06 PRINCIPAL, $12,480.84 INTEREST, $505.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $90,753.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-01-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
